name: sensei-awareness
description: See the invariants, failure modes, and intent that govern the file you are editing — straight from your project's awareness graph.

sensei.serverAddr.description: Address of the awareness-graph gRPC server (host:port). Started with `sensei serve`.

sensei.domain.description: Domain/repo scope (e.g. github.com/owner/repo) for the file view and node detail. Leave empty to auto-derive it from the workspace's git remote (so a multi-domain graph answers with *this* project's rules); set it explicitly to override.

sensei.mode.description: Preflight detail level. compact: top few anchors; standard: a fuller set.

sensei.enabled.description: Query the awareness graph as you switch files. Turn off to stop all background gRPC calls.

sensei.enableLocalOperations.description: Allow the dashboard to run the local `sensei` CLI in your workspace for write operations (e.g. promoting a reviewed candidate). Off by default: the dashboard stays read-only and shows the guarded CLI to run yourself. When on, promotion runs `sensei promote` in your working tree and surfaces the resulting git diff for you to review and commit — it never auto-commits.

sensei.senseiPath.description: Path to the `sensei` CLI used for local operations (see sensei.enableLocalOperations). Defaults to `sensei` on PATH.

sensei.servicesRepoPath.description: Path to the sibling `services` repo, for rebuilding the COMBINED awareness-graph + services seed. Required only when the workspace is the awareness-graph repo (whose committed seed is the combined graph). When set, Rebuild runs `sensei rebuild --combined --services-repo <path> --tag-by-repo`; relative paths resolve against the awareness-graph repo root. Leave empty to auto-detect `../services` — if the workspace needs a combined seed and none is found, Rebuild is disabled rather than silently producing a single-repo seed.

sensei.control.closureAssessment.description: Optional workspace-relative path to the active closure assessment artifact.

sensei.control.convergenceSession.description: Optional workspace-relative path to the active convergence session artifact.

sensei.control.admissionDecision.description: Optional workspace-relative path to the active admission decision artifact.

sensei.control.admissionVerification.description: Optional workspace-relative path to the active admission verification artifact.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run sync-proto && npm run compile
